title: MyGift Small Blue Glass Reed Diffuser Bottles - Vintage Embossed Apothecary Style Flower Bud Vases with Cork Lids - Assorted Designs & Sizes, Set of 4
description:
About this item
Set of 4 vintage style embossed glass decorative bottles colored blue, each with their own unique design
Each blue glass vase features different textured patterns, shapes, and sizes small enough to display on any desk, table, countertop, shelf or mantle
A removable cork is included with each glass jar to secure sand, beads, pebbles, and mini candies, or perfume, oil, extracts, potions, or various concoctions inside **Not watertight or leak-proof**
Decorate around the home with flowers buds and stems, small potpourri, and fragrance diffuser sticks, or place a stylish table centerpiece arrangement for weddings and special events **Flowers, diffusers, and other accessories pictured are NOT included**
Approximate Dimensions (without corks): Extra small - 4.0 H x 2.5 Diameter, Neck - 1.0 Diameter; Small - 5.0 H x 2.6 Diameter, Neck - 1.1 Diameter; Medium - 6.0 H x 3.0 W, Neck - 1.4 Diameter, Large - 7.0 H x 4.0 Diameter, Neck - 1.4 Diameter (in inches)
reviews_5s:
I recently added these small blue glass bottles to my windowsill collection, and I couldn’t be happier! They are absolutely beautiful, with a lovely variety in shapes and sizes that give them a unique and charming look. The rich blue color catches the light perfectly, creating a stunning display, especially during the day when the sunlight shines through them.

Each bottle is well-crafted, with a delicate yet sturdy feel. I love how the different shapes add variety while still complementing one another. They are the perfect size for displaying small flowers, sprigs of herbs, or just as they are—decorative pieces that bring a touch of elegance to any space.

These bottles are a delightful addition to my home, and they’ve completely transformed my windowsill into a bright and cheerful spot. If you love small decorative touches with a vintage vibe, these blue glass bottles are an excellent choice!These were perfect for my project. Beautiful color and sizeUsed these for decor for my book club.. really great quality and now are permanently on my island.. just lovely
